pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.2 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring features.
Explicitly set the Java version property to 21 to ensure compilation and runtime compatibility with JDK 21.
Replace deprecated springfox-swagger dependencies with springdoc-openapi-starter, which is required for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
Update spring-cloud-gateway-mvc version to 4.1.3 to align with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
Add Microsoft Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add WireMock dependency for stubbing HTTP services during testing.
Add explicit javax.validation-api dependency to resolve potential classpath issues or legacy code requirements.
Add Pitest Maven plugin for mutation testing to improve code quality assurance.
Add Jacoco Maven plugin with strict coverage rules to enforce test coverage standards.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to use TCP for event transmission, fixing potential test execution issues.
Configure Maven Jar plugin to set the main class in the manifest for executable JARs.
Add a new Maven profile for running the application with WireMock stubs enabled.
Add a new Maven profile for integration testing scenarios.
Update the Node.js version used by the frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16 for better compatibility.
Restructure pom.xml with comments and organized sections for better readability and maintainability.

.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add placeholder for Chromatic project token to support visual regression testing configuration.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .DS_Store to .gitignore to prevent macOS metadata files from being tracked.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch base image from Maven JDK 11 to Liberica OpenJDK 21 Alpine to support Java 21.
Replace apt-get with apk to align with the new Alpine Linux base image.
Install curl required for fetching Node.js installation scripts.
Install bash required for running shell scripts and nvm.
Install Maven explicitly since the base image no longer includes it.
Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies for Node.js or other tools.
Install nvm to manage Node.js versions instead of using system packages.
Install and set Node.js 16.20.0 as the default version using nvm.
Add Maven build step to compile and package the application during image build.
Define the entrypoint to run the packaged Java application jar.
Copy source code and configuration files into the image for the build step.
